title: lasemia coccinea
intro: Lasemia coccinea, also known as the Red Coral or Coral Root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasemia coccinea include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Lasemia coccinea is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
